seoTitle: Wards Mistake vs Wards River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wards Mistake and Wards River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wards Mistake vs Wards River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wards Mistake and Wards River.
heading: Wards Mistake vs Wards River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wards Mistake, New South Wales and Wards River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wards River has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Wards Mistake (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wards Mistake or Wards River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wards Mistake has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Wards River scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wards Mistake scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Wards River scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wards Mistake or Wards River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wards River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
